title: Summarize my inbox every morning
examplePrompt: Everyday at 7am, summarize my Gmail inbox and send the top 5 important threads to my Signal.
agentDoes: Scans your inbox safely, groups threads by importance, writes a concise bullet summary, and delivers it privately.

title: DCA when a coin dips
examplePrompt: Watch the ETH price on Binance. Whenever it drops below $3000, buy $50 worth of ETH using my trading wallet.
agentDoes: Continuously polls the exchange API for real-time prices. When the threshold is met, it securely signs and executes a buy transaction, then notifies you.

title: Automated PR Code Review
examplePrompt: Review any new Pull Requests on my repository. Check for security flaws, suggest optimizations, and leave a summary comment.
agentDoes: Listens for GitHub webhooks. Clones the diff, runs a static analysis, passes the code to an LLM for review, and posts actionable feedback directly on the PR.

title: Competitor news tracker
examplePrompt: Find any news articles about our 3 main competitors from the last 24 hours, summarize the sentiment, and draft an update for the #marketing Slack channel.
agentDoes: Uses web search to find recent articles. Analyzes the sentiment of each mention, aggregates the findings into a clear report, and pushes it to a Slack channel.

title: Smart Contract Vulnerability Scan
examplePrompt: Scan this Solidity contract for common reentrancy and integer overflow vulnerabilities before deployment.
agentDoes: Analyzes the provided smart contract code using specialized security tools and LLM patterns to identify potential exploits, returning a detailed risk report.

title: Discord Community FAQ Bot
examplePrompt: Monitor the #support channel in Discord. If someone asks a question covered in our docs, reply with the answer and the link.
agentDoes: Listens to Discord messages, queries the knowledge base for semantic matches, and automatically replies to users with helpful documentation links.

title: Translate Docs on PR
examplePrompt: When a PR is merged updating English markdown files, automatically translate those changes to Spanish and Japanese and open a new PR.
agentDoes: Detects merged PRs, extracts the text changes, translates the content using an LLM, and creates a follow-up PR with the localized content.

title: Extract Meeting Action Items
examplePrompt: Take this Zoom transcript, extract all action items with assignees, and create tickets for them in Linear.
agentDoes: Reads the transcript, identifies tasks and who they belong to, then makes API calls to Linear to create and assign the tickets.

title: Calendar Conflict Resolver
examplePrompt: If my calendar gets double booked, automatically email the lower priority meeting to suggest 3 alternative times next week.
agentDoes: Monitors Google Calendar for overlapping events. Identifies priority based on attendees, drafts a polite rescheduling email, and sends it.

title: Auto-Triage GitHub Issues
examplePrompt: Read new GitHub issues. Label them as 'bug' or 'feature', assign a priority based on the user's tier, and assign it to the correct team.
agentDoes: Analyzes incoming issues, checks the reporter's status against the database, applies appropriate labels, and assigns developers.

title: Daily Crypto Portfolio Update
examplePrompt: Check the balances of these 3 Ethereum wallets, calculate the total USD value, and Telegram me a summary at 8 PM.
agentDoes: Fetches on-chain data for the specified addresses, gets current token prices, calculates the portfolio value, and sends a Telegram message.

title: Sales Lead Enrichment
examplePrompt: When a new lead is added to Salesforce, find their recent LinkedIn posts and summarize their company's current goals in the lead notes.
agentDoes: Triggers on Salesforce webhooks, scrapes LinkedIn for the lead's profile and company news, summarizes the insights, and updates the CRM record.

title: On-chain Whale Alerts
examplePrompt: Alert me in Discord if any transaction over 1000 ETH happens on the Uniswap V3 router.
agentDoes: Listens to the Ethereum mempool or block events, filters for large transactions to a specific contract, and dispatches a Discord webhook.

title: Notion to Blog Publisher
examplePrompt: When I move a Notion page to the 'Published' column, convert the content to Markdown, commit it to my Next.js repo, and trigger a Vercel deploy.
agentDoes: Polls Notion databases for status changes, extracts block content to Markdown, pushes a commit via GitHub API, which triggers the site build.

title: Server Log Anomaly Detector
examplePrompt: Watch my Datadog logs. If error rates spike 50% above the baseline, analyze the stack traces and page the on-call engineer in PagerDuty.
agentDoes: Monitors log streams. On threshold breach, groups similar errors, uses LLM to identify the likely root cause, and triggers a high-urgency page.

title: Social Sentiment Trading
examplePrompt: Analyze Twitter sentiment for $SOL over the last hour. If sentiment is overwhelmingly positive and volume is up, place a small long order on Bybit.
agentDoes: Scrapes Twitter for keyword mentions, scores sentiment using AI, checks trading volume via API, and executes a trade if conditions are met.
